expectations.text: All color values use hsl() notation exclusively (not hex or rgb)
expectations.evidence: 101 hsl() uses; only 2 hex values in entire file (non-color usage in markup)

expectations.text: Defines at least 5 distinct shades of the primary blue (light to dark)
expectations.evidence: 35 primary/blue CSS custom properties defined — full 9+ shade scale from 50 to 950

expectations.text: Includes a neutral grey scale with at least 4 shades
expectations.evidence: Grey scale present with named variables; grey/neutral CSS variables found throughout

expectations.text: Includes semantic colors for at least success (green) and danger/error (red)
expectations.evidence: Semantic color section present with success, danger/error hsl() values defined
